name: VerifyAsyncFunctionAppDeployment
description: This task verifies the successful deployment of an Azure Function App to the Flex Consumption plan by polling the Azure Deployment Center for real-time status updates.
helpMarkDown: Use this task immediately after AzureFunctionApp@2 with Flex Consumption enabled. It blocks the pipeline until the asynchronous Azure deployment reaches a terminal success, failure, or timeout state.
instanceNameFormat: Verify async Function App deployment for $(functionAppName)
author: Azure Core Ecosystem

inputs.name: connectedServiceNameARM
inputs.label: Subscription
inputs.helpMarkDown: Azure Resource Manager service connection used to authenticate to the Function App subscription.

inputs.name: functionAppName
inputs.label: Function App Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the Azure Function App being verified. In the classic editor, this field is populated from Function Apps in the selected Azure subscription.

inputs.name: pollingIntervalSeconds
inputs.label: Polling Interval
inputs.helpMarkDown: Time in seconds between each deployment status check.

inputs.name: timeoutMinutes
inputs.label: Timeout Duration
inputs.helpMarkDown: Maximum time in minutes to wait for asynchronous deployment completion.

outputVariables.name: deploymentStatus
outputVariables.description: Final deployment status: Succeeded, Failed, or Timed Out.

outputVariables.name: errorMessage
outputVariables.description: Detailed deployment failure or timeout message.

outputVariables.name: deploymentDuration
outputVariables.description: Total time taken for the deployment verification to complete or fail, in seconds.

outputVariables.name: deploymentId
outputVariables.description: Deployment operation identifier returned by the Deployment Center or Kudu API.
